bead.title: e2e: multi-partition produce/consume roundtrip integrity
bead.description:
Current test_rdkafka_produce_consume_roundtrip uses a single partition. This bead adds a version using >=3 partitions. Produce N messages with varied keys (distributing across partitions), consume via a single consumer subscribed to the topic, assert set-equality of produced vs consumed payloads.
In-scope files:
- tests/integration.rs (new fn test_rdkafka_multi_partition_roundtrip)
bead.acceptance: `cargo test --test integration test_rdkafka_multi_partition_roundtrip -- --ignored --nocapture` passes. Assertion is set-equality of produced and consumed (key, value) pairs across all partitions.
